module_info.docstring:
Tests for virtual namespace file reservations (bd-14z).

Covers:
- Virtual path (tool://, resource://, service://) reservations are created successfully
- Virtual path conflict detection (exact match between different agents)
- Virtual paths don't conflict with filesystem paths
- Virtual paths can be released normally
- Suspicious pattern detection allows virtual paths
- _is_virtual_namespace helper

functions.name: _get_data
functions.docstring: Extract data dict from tool result.

functions.name: _setup_project_with_agents
functions.docstring: Register `count` agents in the project and return their names.

functions.name: test_virtual_reservation_created
functions.docstring: Virtual namespace path can be reserved successfully.

functions.name: test_multiple_virtual_reservations
functions.docstring: Multiple virtual namespace paths can be reserved at once.

functions.name: test_virtual_reservation_conflict
functions.docstring: Two agents reserving the same virtual path shows a conflict.

functions.name: test_virtual_no_conflict_with_filesystem
functions.docstring: Virtual path and filesystem path never conflict, even with similar names.

functions.name: test_virtual_different_paths_no_conflict
functions.docstring: Different virtual paths don't conflict with each other.

functions.name: test_virtual_reservation_release
functions.docstring: Virtual namespace reservations can be released normally.

functions.name: test_mixed_fs_and_virtual_reservation
functions.docstring: An agent can hold both filesystem and virtual reservations.
